  • Classes in jpa.dto.concert used by jpa.controllers
    Class
    Description
    CreateConcertRequestDto
    Payload used by an organizer to request concert creation.
  • Classes in jpa.dto.concert used by jpa.dao.abstracts
    Class
    Description
    ResponseAdminConcertModerationDto
    Flat projection returned by admin moderation listing endpoints.
    ResponseConcertDetailsDto
    Full concert representation returned by concert endpoints.
    ResponseConcertPlaceDto
    Published concert projection including venue details.
    ResponseOrganizerConcertDto
    Organizer concert listing projection with place and ticket aggregates.
    ResponseOrganizerConcertStatsRowDto
    Flat row projection used by DAO for organizer stats computation.
